content:
## Eligibility Requirements
EcoCard is available to applicants who meet both listed underwriting inputs for this product:

1. Minimum annual income must be 45000.
2. Minimum credit tier must be fair.

Do not describe EcoCard as requiring a higher tier or income level than these product terms specify. If the customer has not provided either required eligibility input, collect that information before comparing EcoCard against another card. See "Internal: Credit Card Recommendation Policy" for how to choose among eligible cards.

## Pricing Terms
| Term | EcoCard value |
|---|---:|
| Annual fee | 0 |
| Purchase APR | 25.99 |
| Foreign transaction fee | 2.0 |
| Balance transfer intro period | 0 |
| Rho Bank Plus bonus | 0.0 |

For broader comparison across products, use "Credit Card Fee Apr Rewards Matrix" rather than adding assumptions to this card page.

## Rewards Profile
EcoCard earns cashback at the following rates:

- Everyday: 1.0
- Groceries: 1.5
- Dining: 1.0
- Travel: 1.0
- Sustainable purchases: 3.5
- Crypto purchases: 0.25

When explaining rewards, keep each category tied to its listed rate. Do not imply an introductory balance-transfer benefit or an additional Rho Bank Plus uplift beyond the values shown above.
title: EcoCard Terms
